title: Populate defaultDealStages with probabilities
description:
## Objective
Add the agreed `probability` value to every entry in `defaultDealStages` so the new required field is satisfied at compile time.

## Spec Reference
`.devmeta/projects/2026-05-21-stage-probability/2026-05-21-stage-probability-spec.md` — Section: "Architecture / Files to modify"

## Scope
**Files:** `src/components/atomic-crm/root/defaultConfiguration.ts` — only `defaultDealStages`.

## Implementation
Update each entry in `defaultDealStages` to include `probability`:
- opportunity → 0.10
- proposal-sent → 0.50
- in-negociation → 0.75
- won → 1.00
- lost → 0.00
- delayed → 0.25

Keep existing order and `value` / `label` text unchanged.

## Tests
Run: `npm run typecheck`
Expected: passes (no DealStage construction-sites remain broken).
closed_reason: All six default stages now carry probability (0.10 / 0.50 / 0.75 / 1.0 / 0.0 / 0.25). npm run typecheck clean.
